meaning: n.集合,聚集vi.集合,聚集,渐增,蹙眉,化脓vt.使聚集,搜集,积聚,推断
examples: People would gather from near and far.
Weeks after his death, mourners still gather outside the house.
It is also where they go to gather their thoughts in times of crisis.
Young things dressed in small things gather at Jean Georges or at the Whampoa Club.
